seo.title: Powerton Engineering - Sarrafa Masana'antu da Paneli na Sarrafa | Indiya
seo.description: Babban masana'anta na paneli na sarrafa wutar lantarki, tsarin sarrafa masana'antu da kuma hanyoyin kayan aiki. Sabis na injiniya na musamman a duk faɗin Indiya tare da gogewa fiye da shekaru 15.

seo.title: Catalog na Kayayyakin Masana'antu - Sarrafa da Kayan Lantarki | Powerton Engineering
seo.description: Catalog mai cikakke na kayayyakin sarrafa masana'antu, kayan lantarki, kayan aiki, tsarin hasken rana, famfo da kayan aiki. Kayan aiki masu inganci don amfani na masana'antu.

seo.title: Sabis na Injiniya na Ƙwararru - Shigarwa, Kulawa da Sarrafa | Powerton Engineering
seo.description: Sabis na injiniya na musamman: shirye-shiryen PLC, tsarin SCADA, sarrafa masana'antu, shigar da paneli na lantarki, kulawa, daidaitawa, hanyoyin keɓancewa da sabis na EPC na hasken rana a duk faɗin Indiya.

seo.title: Shafin Ba a Samu ba (404) - Powerton Engineering
seo.description: Shafin da kuke nema babu. Koma shafin farko na Powerton Engineering ko bincika sabis da kayayyakinmu na sarrafa masana'antu.

notFound.heading: Shafin Ba a Samu ba

hero.title: Ƙimar Injiniya
hero.subtitle: Samu shawarwarin injiniya na ƙwarewa da kimantawar farashin
Faɗin samfuranmu da ayyuka suna ba da maganin cikakke waɗanda ke haɓaka nasarar masana'antu, suna tabbatar da cewa kowane bangare na bukatun injiniya ana rufe su.

services.label: Ayyukanmu
services.title: Maganin kwararru don duk bukatun, da aka bayar da kulawa ta musamman
services.description: Daga sarrafa tsarota zuwa kwangilar gyara, muna ba da cikakkun maganin injiniya da suka dace da bukatun ku na masana'antu.

products.label: Kayayyakinmu
products.title: Maganin Kayan Aikin Sarrafa Masana'antu
products.description: Cikakken kewayon kayayyakin lantarki da sarrafa da aka tsara don dogara, inganci da babban aiki a mahallin masana'antu.

projects.label: Ayyukanmu
projects.title: Maganin Injiniya da aka Kai da Nasara
projects.description: Bincike tarin ayyukan da muka kammala waɗanda ke nuna gwaninta mu a sarrafa masana'antu da injiniyan lantarki.

about.label: Game da Mu
about.title: Maraba da zuwa Powerton Engineering Pvt. Ltd.
about.description: Abokin ciniki mai aminci a samar da kayayyaki da ayyukan injiniya masu inganci. An kafa shi da hangen nesa na ba da iko ga masana'antu ta hanyar sabbin abubuwa da nagarta, mun ƙware wajen samar da kayan lantarki da na'urori masu yawa.
about.visualDescription: Injiniyoyin Indiya masu ƙwararru da ke aiki akan sarrafa masana'antu da tsarin sarrafa

contact.description: A shirye kuke don fara aikin ku na gaba? Tuntuɓe ƙungiyar kwararrun mu don maganin da aka keɓanta da shawarwarin ƙwararru.
